stories.title: Four months in, how Matt Campbell is already resha...
stories.summary: Changes are already evident on the second floor of Penn State's football building, but will they translate into top-10 wins?

stories.summary: Nail the transfer portal? Miss a big recruit? Find a top coordinator? All are part of our offseason evaluations.

stories.title: Ex-Braves owner, media mogul Turner dies at 87
stories.summary: Ted Turner, the former owner of the Braves and Hawks who made his mark as a media mogul and a philanthropist, has died at the age of 87.

stories.title: DeChambeau plans YouTube pivot if LIV dissolves
stories.summary: Two-time major champion Bryson DeChambeau said if LIV Golf dissolves he plans to focus on growing his YouTube channel.

stories.title: Astros' Correa to have ankle surgery, done for '26...
stories.summary: Astros infielder Carlos Correa has a torn tendon in his left ankle, will undergo surgery and will miss the remainder of the season.
